title: Adapt Contact
description: A B2B contact record returned by the Adapt Prospect API. Email is populated only after the contact has been purchased via POST /contact/fetch.

id.description: Adapt contact identifier; used to purchase the contact via /contact/fetch.

email.description: Verified work email. Populated only on enrichment or purchase.

title.description: Job title at the current company.

phoneNumber.description: Direct dial and mobile numbers. Populated only after purchase.

emailDeliverabilityScore.description: Email deliverability confidence; common thresholds are 75, 85, and 95.
